client_card.body: As you explore the AI infrastructure super-cycle, I noticed that your portfolio's current allocation to private equity could potentially be complemented by exposure to this emerging trend, aligning with your values of innovation and legacy. I'd love to discuss how this might fit into your overall wealth strategy and explore ways to potentially enhance your portfolio's diversification.
